title: Enhanced Vision
description: Enhanced Vision highlights the outlines of objects and walls, and it blurs objects, with the blur increasing with increasing distance of the object from the centre of the player's view. Additionally, it adds a shimmering effect over fire sources and lava.
body:
# Enhanced Vision Shader
![Aurora](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9158ab1cb6af51b279ade3198d570c23351a7554_0.webp)
![Sky](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e0a33a46401790bd403e5e5ba8b13478c7bc1d2_0.webp)
![Heat Shimmer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee340f93f022bafebe0bd2831d381662898c04c6_0.webp)
## Features:
1.It shows outlines of mobs and walls around the centre screen, with outline brightness increasing as darkness increases. 

2.It adds a shimmering effect above lava and other heat sources to mimic real-life shimmering over fire sources. 

3.It blurs objects which are on the side of the screen, with the strength of the blur effect increasing with increasing distance of the object from the centre of the screen. 

4.It creates reflections on the surface of the water. 

5.It adds auroras and stars to the night sky. 

6.It improves the sky colouring. 

7.It adds basic foliage swaying.
